## Dungeon Generation Research Summary

### Current Room Generation Algorithm

The system uses **Binary Space Partitioning (BSP)** in `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/dungeon-generation.ts`.

1. **BSP Split**: A root node covering the full grid (200x150 tiles for floor 1, scaling up 15% per floor) is recursively split into leaf nodes. Split depth is 5-7 depending on floor number. Minimum leaf size is 30 tiles.
